body: This PR moves the post processing into a dedicated folder.
title: Move post processing into dedicated folder

body:
This PR
 - Refactors some of the TC initialization
 - Passes `thermo_params` over `param_set` more
 - Replaces a `real_center_indices` loop with broadcast expressions
title: Refactor TC init

body: This PR fixes the allocation monitoring (in the long runs) by removing a folder that no longer exists
title: Remove non existent directory from alloc monitoring

body:
## Purpose 
In order to identify the bug causing non-determinism in the IMEX EDMF experiments, I am splitting that PR into several smaller PRs. This first PR is a collection of minor changes that (hopefully) have no effect on the behavior of the simulation.

## Content
- Change the `compressible_edmf_bomex` pipeline example `dt` from 1s to 40s
- Add an identical example that uses JFNK instead of Newton's method (this can actually run with a 45s `dt`, but the resulting profiles are extremely noisy)
- Change `ds_filename_reference` from `joinpath(path, ds_filename_computed)` to `joinpath(path, job_id, "prog_state.nc")` in `compute_mse.jl`, so that both examples can use the same reference data
- Modify `define_tc_quicklook_profiles.jl`, `self_reference_or_path.jl`, and `driver.jl` so that the quicklook plot can be generated locally, without looking up the reference data from `main` (this is very helpful for debugging)
- Rename `CA.implicit_tendency!` to `CA.implicit_vertical_advection_tendency!`, and move the zeroing out of the implicit EDMF tendency from `src` to `examples` (this is so that, when `TCU.sgs_flux_tendency!` is split into `TCU.explicit_sgs_flux_tendency!` and `TCU.implicit_sgs_flux_tendency!`, `TCU.implicit_sgs_flux_tendency!` can be called from `examples`, right after the implicit EDMF tendency is zeroed out)
title: Add JFNK pipeline example and other minor changes
